title: Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises family as a Subject Matter Expert in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
